title: Smoky Empanadas with Chicken Filling
description: Classic empanadas filled with a flavorful chicken mixture, perfect for a quick snack or dinner.

ingredients.name: Garlicky Chicken Filling
ingredients.amount: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast, cut into small pieces

instructions: Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a large skillet, heat a couple of tablespoons of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink.
Add the smoky paprika and cook for another minute.
Stir in the cheddar and Parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Spoon a tablespoon or two of the chicken mixture onto one half of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape, and press the edges together with a fork to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of olive oil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
